hypothesis: Increase both L2 regularization (lambda_l2=1.0) and add L1 regularization (lambda_l1=0.1). Previous exp_0077 with lambda_l2=1.0 achieved WRMSSE=0.94505 (best so far). Adding L1 regularization (lambda_l1=0.1) may further improve generalization by inducing sparsity in the feature weights. All other settings match exp_0077: num_leaves=256, max_depth=8, tweedie_variance_power=1.5, lr=0.04.
